# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: http_listener
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          codec_type: AUTO
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: api_gateway
              domains: ["*"] # Match all domains
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/users"
                route:
                  cluster: user_service_cluster
                  timeout: 10s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/products"
                route:
                  cluster: product_service_cluster
                  timeout: 10s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/orders"
                route:
                  cluster: order_service_cluster
                  timeout: 10s
              - match: # Default route for any unmatched API paths, could return 404
                  prefix: "/api/"
                direct_response:
                  status: 404
                  body:
                    inline_string: "Not Found"
              - match: # Catch-all route to a default or error page service
                  prefix: "/"
                route:
                  cluster: default_fallback_cluster
                  timeout: 5s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
  - name: user_service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    # Connection Pooling (HTTP/1.1 example)
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 60s # Connection will be closed if idle for 60 seconds
    http1_protocol_options:
      max_requests_per_connection: 100 # Max requests over a single connection
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/healthz" # Health check endpoint for user service
      no_traffic_interval: 1s # Check even if no traffic
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: user_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 8081
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 8082

  - name: product_service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 60s
    http1_protocol_options:
      max_requests_per_connection: 100
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/healthz" # Health check endpoint for product service
      no_traffic_interval: 1s
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: product_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 8083
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 8084

  - name: order_service_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 60s
    http1_protocol_options:
      max_requests_per_connection: 100
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - priority: DEFAULT
        max_connections: 1024
        max_requests: 1024
        max_pending_requests: 1024
        max_retries: 3
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/healthz" # Health check endpoint for order service
      no_traffic_interval: 1s
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: order_service_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 8085

  - name: default_fallback_cluster
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: STATIC
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    common_http_protocol_options:
      idle_timeout: 60s
    http1_protocol_options:
      max_requests_per_connection: 100
    health_checks:
    - timeout: 1s
      interval: 5s
      unhealthy_threshold: 3
      healthy_threshold: 1
      http_health_check:
        path: "/healthz" # Health check endpoint for a default service
      no_traffic_interval: 1s
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: default_fallback_cluster
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: 127.0.0.1
                port_value: 8090 # A simple service that perhaps returns an HTML page

admin:
  address:
    socket_address:
      protocol: TCP
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
